phase-04.name: Homepage Sections
phase-04.notes: All 10 sections implemented & Verified. UI Gap fixed.

phase-05.name: Content Pages
phase-05.notes: Completed: PG-06 (Org Structure), News pages (full polish), Course pages (quick polish), Service pages (quick polish). Pending: About, Contact.

phase-06.name: Admin Panel
phase-06.notes: CKEditor 5 integration done. Full CRUD for Posts, Courses, Staff, Partners, Pages, Media, Contacts. Locale-separate images & SEO. Audit in progress.

phase-08.name: Polish & Deploy
phase-08.notes: QA Orchestration passed. Responsive fixes applied.

recent_changes.description: Implemented Organizational Structure page and Staff migration.
Fixed Partner logos displaying in grayscale. Removed grayscale CSS classes.
Started Admin Panel CRUD Audit. Created debug scripts for Partner deletion.
Fixed excessive white gap on homepage by removing `pt-24` from main container. Sticky header handles spacing.

decisions_made.decision: Use backend migration script for Staff images
decisions_made.reason: Images were available in local backup (`old/httpdocs`), allowing direct upload to Cloudinary without scraping active site (which had DNS issues).

decisions_made.decision: Group Staff by Department in UI
decisions_made.reason: Matches the organizational hierarchical view required for 'Cơ cấu tổ chức'.

decisions_made.decision: Display Partner logos in full color
decisions_made.reason: User feedback indicated that grayscale logos looked 'disabled'. Full color is more vibrant and respectful to partners.

pending_tasks.task: Manual verification of Homepage Responsive Fix
Static pages (About detail, Contact) UI/UX polish

errors_encountered.error: Cloudinary Upload Failed: DNS resolution error for vienphuongnam.edu.vn
errors_encountered.solution: Switched to using local backup files in `old/httpdocs/uploads`.
